description: Pencheff first-party safe web server exposure checks.
matcher_dsl: Combine matchers with &&. Supported: CODE, BODY, BODY_REGEX, HEADER, COOKIE, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_GT, SIZE_LT. Prefix with ! to negate.

checks.title: Apache mod_status Exposed
checks.remediation: Restrict mod_status to trusted administrative networks or disable it.

checks.title: Apache mod_info Exposed
checks.remediation: Restrict mod_info to trusted administrative networks or disable it.

checks.title: nginx stub_status Exposed
checks.remediation: Restrict nginx status endpoints to trusted networks.

checks.title: IIS web.config Exposed
checks.remediation: Block direct access to configuration files.

checks.title: Tomcat Manager Interface Present
checks.remediation: Restrict Tomcat manager access and enforce strong authentication.

checks.title: Tomcat Host Manager Interface Present
checks.remediation: Restrict Tomcat host-manager access and enforce strong authentication.

checks.title: Jenkins Interface Present
checks.remediation: Require authentication and restrict Jenkins exposure.

checks.title: Jenkins Script Console Path Present
checks.remediation: Restrict Jenkins administrative endpoints.

checks.title: Grafana Login Interface Present
checks.remediation: Keep Grafana patched, disable anonymous access unless required, and enforce SSO/MFA.

checks.title: Grafana API Search Endpoint Reachable
checks.remediation: Review anonymous Grafana permissions and public dashboard exposure.

checks.title: Spring Actuator Environment Exposed
checks.remediation: Disable or restrict actuator endpoints and sanitize environment output.

checks.title: Spring Actuator Heapdump Exposed
checks.remediation: Disable heapdump exposure and rotate secrets that may be present in memory.

checks.title: Laravel-style Environment File Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove .env from web root and rotate any exposed credentials.

checks.title: Laravel Ignition Debug Endpoint Exposed
checks.remediation: Disable debug tooling in production.

checks.title: Rails Routes Debug Page Exposed
checks.remediation: Disable Rails debug routes in production.

checks.title: Django Debug Toolbar Exposed
checks.remediation: Disable debug toolbar and DEBUG mode in production.

checks.title: WordPress readme.html Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove readme.html or restrict access if version disclosure is a concern.

checks.title: WordPress Configuration Backup Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove backup files from web root and rotate database credentials.

checks.title: WordPress Install Script Reachable
checks.remediation: Remove or block install scripts after deployment.

checks.title: Joomla Configuration Backup Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove backup files and rotate exposed credentials.

checks.title: Joomla Administrator Interface Present
checks.remediation: Restrict administrative access and enforce MFA.

checks.title: CGI Test Script Present
checks.remediation: Remove test CGI scripts from production.

checks.title: CGI printenv Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove diagnostic CGI scripts from production.

checks.title: Git HEAD Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove .git metadata from deployed web roots or block it at the web server.

checks.title: Subversion Metadata Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove VCS metadata from deployed web roots.

checks.title: Mercurial Metadata Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove VCS metadata from deployed web roots.

checks.title: docker-compose.yml Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove deployment manifests from public web roots.

checks.title: Kubernetes kubeconfig Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove kubeconfig from web roots and rotate exposed credentials.

checks.title: AWS Credentials File Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove credentials from web roots and rotate exposed IAM keys.

checks.title: SQL Backup Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove database backups from public paths and rotate secrets.

checks.title: Database Dump Exposed
checks.remediation: Remove database dumps from public paths and rotate secrets.

checks.title: Swagger UI Exposed
checks.remediation: Ensure API documentation is intended to be public and does not disclose sensitive endpoints.

checks.title: OpenAPI Specification Exposed
checks.remediation: Ensure API schemas are intended to be public.
